title: More Fruits
description: Adds NEW Fruits Into The Game
body:
This mod is made with MCreator

This mod adds 4 new fruits into the game. It also adds apple trees because apples dropping from oak is a bit unrealistic.
The new fruits are: Pear, Orange, Mango and Pineapple + a new wood type (Fruit Wood)


Each fruit tree can be found in their biomes
Apple and pear = All types of Forests
Orange = Flower Forests
Mango = All types of Jungles

Each fruit can also be found in shipwrecks. This is the way to get Pineapples.


To grow Pineapples you have to craft them into seeds and place them on blocks with the tag "dirt"
This list includes:
Dirt, Grass, Podzol, Coarse Dirt, Mycelium, Rooted Dirt, Moss Blocks, Mud, Muddy Mangrove Roots


Each fruit also has a golden variant

### IF YOU WANT TO STAY SPOILER FREE FOR THE GOLDEN FRUIT EFFECTS, DONT READ FURDER!!!

Golden Fruit Effects:
Golden Apple
	(vanilla)

Golden Pear
> Absorbtion I 2m | Speed II 10s

Golden Orange
> Absorbtion I 2m | Resistance II 10s

Golden Mango
> Absorbtion I 2m | Fire Resistance I 20s

Golden Pineapple
> Absorbtion I 2m | Haste II 20s
